text: Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as a Guide. Excited to have you here! 🎉
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a Helper. Thanks for joining! 🎉
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a Member. Feel free to ask questions and get involved! 🎉
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor. Your experience will be valuable here! 🎉
